data.body: VERIFIER framing refined (user insight): Pass-2 adjudicates TWO competing claims (plan vs finding). Pass-1 owns plan-skepticism, so Pass-2 skepticism is aimed at the FINDING — and charitable plan-reading IS the affirmative mechanism for that skepticism (not sycophancy): finding stands only if it holds under the plan most-reasonable reading (entailment), independent of plan/finder confidence. Whole pipeline = ONE critical-framing pattern (skepticism of the claim-under-test per stage: Pass-1->plan, Pass-2->finding); more effective because the critical instruction is POSITIVE (read plan charitably) not a pink-elephant negative (dont rubber-stamp). Reworded PASS2_SYSTEM opening + entailment gate; principle in epic 6f2d (check-ac 14/clarity 7). Smoke: a finding correctly dropped at conf 0.29. Committed.
